lessons.title: What are Factors?
lessons.description: Understand categorical data and how factors store it efficiently.

lessons.title: Creating and Examining Factors
lessons.description: Create factors with factor(), check levels, and compare with character vectors.

lessons.title: Factor Levels: Ordering and Releveling
lessons.description: Change the order of levels, set reference levels, and create ordered factors.

lessons.title: Working with Factors in Analysis
lessons.description: Use factors in tables, plots, and modeling; convert between factors and characters.
